'''Q-Varx''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] that represented the [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]] in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]]. Q-Varx was a leader of the [[Rationalist Party]] on the planet [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. However, in reality Q-Varx was a traitor, passing vital information about the Republic to [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]] and attempting to poison [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] in return for bribes. When this was discovered, Q-Varx was stripped of all positions and imprisoned. Only Rieekan's recovery saved Q-Varx from the death sentence.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Q-Varx is also misspelled "Q-Varg" in chapter 14<ref name="PoT">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref>.
